productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Chicago Bulls Red T-shirt
description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, short sleeves, and shimmery graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 40 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Look cool while working out in this red T-shirt from adidas. The print gives the tee an edgy vibe, while the soft cotton/polyester blend wicks moisture from the skin to the fabrics surface for easy evaporation. Team it with tracks or jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
